modelNotes.explainability: Deterministic from signal metadata, ontology mapping, and config coefficients.

enrichedSignals.title: AFC Project Preparation Capital Path to USG
enrichedSignals.summary: AFC project-preparation capital (AIFF/development budget) appears aligned to pre-FID structuring pathways that could support USG mandate-based development fees.
enrichedSignals.flow: AFC prep budget -> project/SPV development account -> USG retainer/milestone/success fees
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Sizing assumptions are unverified and should remain Monitor until first-party AFC docs or Tier-1 corroboration.

enrichedSignals.title: Nigeria Infrastructure Financing Gap Escalation
enrichedSignals.summary: Nigeria’s infrastructure financing gap remains materially above available annual public allocation capacity. The widening gap increases pressure on sovereign capital allocation authorities to approve structured, governance-aligned platforms that compress risk before FID. This strengthens the probability of mandate-based pre-FID structuring engagements.
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor until first-party sources or Tier-1 corroboration meet verification threshold.

enrichedSignals.title: National Grid Instability / Capacity Shortfall
enrichedSignals.summary: Ongoing grid instability and generation-to-distribution inefficiencies continue to constrain economic output. Persistent energy pressure increases urgency for structured energy infrastructure pathways with clear capital stack definition and decision sequencing before execution.
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor until first-party sources or Tier-1 corroboration meet verification threshold.

enrichedSignals.title: Gulf Sovereign Capital Reallocation Toward Africa Infrastructure
enrichedSignals.summary: Recent directional capital flows indicate sustained Gulf sovereign interest in cross-border infrastructure deployment across Africa. This increases probability of sovereign-aligned platform mandates where governance clarity precedes capital commitment.
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor until first-party sources or Tier-1 corroboration meet verification threshold.

enrichedSignals.title: AfDB Project Preparation Facility Activation Expansion
enrichedSignals.summary: African Development Bank project preparation programs continue to support pre-FID structuring and feasibility pipelines. Expansion or prioritization of preparation facilities increases likelihood of institutional capital engaging at the governance-architecture stage.
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor until first-party sources or Tier-1 corroboration meet verification threshold.

enrichedSignals.title: U.S.–Nigeria Strategic Infrastructure Alignment
enrichedSignals.summary: Ongoing U.S.–Nigeria cooperation in infrastructure and energy sectors improves perceived political risk alignment and strengthens downstream bankability pathways. While catalytic capital participates below governance, this alignment increases sovereign confidence in structured platforms.
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor until first-party sources or Tier-1 corroboration meet verification threshold.

enrichedSignals.title: Sovereign Fiscal Constraint Tightening
enrichedSignals.summary: Fiscal constraint pressures increase emphasis on disciplined capital allocation and risk compression before project approval. This heightens demand for governance clarity, defined capital stacks, and structured pre-FID sequencing.
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor until first-party sources or Tier-1 corroboration meet verification threshold.

enrichedSignals.title: PIF Strategy Leadership Shift Toward Domestic Alignment
enrichedSignals.summary: Reported appointment of acting strategy lead at PIF with explicit alignment toward domestic development priorities suggests stronger Vision-2030 bias in capital deployment posture.
enrichedSignals.flow: Leadership change -> strategy realignment -> domestic deployment bias -> tighter criteria for external allocations
enrichedSignals.verification_note: High relevance signal. Keep Monitor until first-party PIF statement or threshold corroboration is met.

enrichedSignals.title: PIF signs initial terms for advanced integrated aluminum complex in Saudi Arabia
enrichedSignals.summary: Official PIF press release indicates active strategic-sector domestic deployment via initial terms for an integrated aluminum complex, reinforcing domestic industrial capital activation posture.
enrichedSignals.flow: PIF strategic mandate -> domestic industrial complex terms -> capex deployment bias -> tighter external allocation selectivity
enrichedSignals.verification_note: First-party source (PIF official press release URL).

enrichedSignals.title: PIF Vendor Gate as official supplier/partner pre-qualification channel
enrichedSignals.summary: PIF Vendor Gate is the official entry channel for supplier registration, pre-qualification, and procurement visibility prior to project RFP flows.
enrichedSignals.flow: Vendor registration -> pre-qualification visibility -> shortlist eligibility -> RFQ/RFP access
enrichedSignals.verification_note: First-party source (official PIF Vendor Gate page).

enrichedSignals.title: Dangote Cement and Sinoma sign strategic framework for 12 construction/expansion projects
enrichedSignals.summary: Reported MOU signing in Lagos between Dangote Cement and Sinoma for execution of twelve new construction and expansion projects, indicating active infrastructure/industrial execution momentum.
enrichedSignals.flow: Strategic framework signing -> project execution pipeline visibility -> stronger near-term infrastructure deployment signal
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor until corroborated by first-party release page or Tier-1 independent reporting with full attribution.

sources.label: User-provided X post text (Dangote Group account context)

enrichedSignals.title: DFC FY26 NDAA mandate expansion materially increases strategic capital deployment headroom
enrichedSignals.summary: Reported FY26 NDAA changes significantly expand DFC balance-sheet capacity, equity flexibility, and strategic sector/geographic investment authorities, improving pre-FID platform structuring feasibility across critical sectors.
enrichedSignals.flow: Expanded mandate/capacity -> stronger early-stage de-risking tools -> improved pre-FID structuring viability -> higher probability of capital deployment at FID
enrichedSignals.verification_note: High relevance. Keep Monitor until first-party statutory/official confirmation links are attached in-source bundle.

enrichedSignals.title: Africa AI spillover friction: data sovereignty and cross-border governance vacuum
enrichedSignals.summary: Gulf AI compute proximity increases cross-border data flow pressure while many African jurisdictions lack mature AI data governance and negotiation frameworks.
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Strategy insight logged for monitoring; escalate to Verified with first-party or Tier-1 corroboration.

enrichedSignals.title: Africa AI spillover friction: energy and edge infrastructure readiness gap
enrichedSignals.summary: AI utility is constrained without stable power, fiber backbone, edge nodes, and AI-ready facilities; physical/digital dependencies create pre-FID bottlenecks.

enrichedSignals.title: Nigeria outlines ~$25B plan aimed at resolving electricity system constraints
enrichedSignals.summary: Reported national-scale electricity investment plan indicates elevated urgency around power reliability, transmission/distribution upgrades, and financing architecture requirements.
enrichedSignals.flow: Grid constraint pressure -> large capital plan signal -> increased need for governance + capital sequencing before bankable execution
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor pending first-party government release or Tier-1 corroboration with detailed attribution.

enrichedSignals.title: Live Regulated Financial-Energy Operating System — Nigeria
enrichedSignals.summary: Live licensed and revenue-generating financial-energy operating system in Nigeria with 2000+ physical fuel nodes, corporate client traction, and multi-layer money/energy/commerce/governance integration.
enrichedSignals.flow: Licensed banking + active revenue + physical node density -> execution credibility and definability lift for infrastructure and capital mandate pathways
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Tier 1 internal signal weighting due to regulated status, active revenues, and physical infrastructure footprint. Add App Store URL and partner attribution for external-source completeness. App Store URL attached.

enrichedSignals.title: DFC opens New York office at 100 Pearl St. to tighten private-capital execution loop
enrichedSignals.summary: Reported February 2026 launch of DFC NYC office (about 50 staff incl. underwriting/legal) to improve private-sector connectivity, talent acquisition, and deal execution.
enrichedSignals.flow: NYC footprint + underwriting/legal proximity -> faster structuring and sponsor interface -> higher near-term transaction velocity potential
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor until first-party DFC release or Tier-1 source URLs are attached per sovereign verification threshold.

enrichedSignals.title: Rwanda launches INIR-readiness pathway for nuclear program with SMR orientation
enrichedSignals.summary: Rwanda has moved into formal nuclear-readiness sequencing with pre-INIR/INIR engagement and explicit SMR planning context, signaling institutional commitment to long-horizon baseload capacity buildout.
enrichedSignals.flow: Formal IAEA-readiness process + national regulator positioning -> sovereign energy program credibility -> higher probability of structured capital and execution mandates.
enrichedSignals.verification_note: First-party Rwanda regulator source attached (RAEB/RISA). Keep additional IAEA mission outputs for continued verification hardening.

sources.label: RAEB/RISA official update: Rwanda Hosts Pre-INIR Mission

enrichedSignals.title: Nigeria net FX reserves rise 772% to $34.8B; gross reserves reach $50.45B in Feb 2026
enrichedSignals.summary: Reported reserve expansion materially improves macro buffer optics and may reduce perceived FX fragility in Nigeria, supporting higher confidence for structured capital commitments.
enrichedSignals.flow: Reserve rebuild + transparency narrative -> lower macro-risk perception -> improved pre-FID convertibility conditions for sovereign/DFI capital
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor pending first-party CBN release or two Tier-1 full-source confirmations per sovereign verification threshold. Business Insider Africa source attached.

enrichedSignals.title: U.S. CLARITY Act advances digital-asset market structure (SEC/CFTC line + illicit-finance controls)
enrichedSignals.summary: Senate Banking Committee fact-sheet package positions CLARITY Act as a rules-of-the-road framework for digital assets, with investor protections, SEC/CFTC jurisdiction clarity, DeFi control-point logic, and expanded illicit-finance enforcement tools.
enrichedSignals.flow: Regulatory clarity + enforcement certainty -> reduced legal ambiguity for compliant digital-asset infrastructure -> improved onshore capital formation conditions
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor pending first-party Senate Banking Committee release pages and bill text links attached directly in source set.

enrichedSignals.title: L&T and NVIDIA announce India gigawatt-scale AI factory initiative
enrichedSignals.summary: L&T announced a strategic partnership with NVIDIA to build sovereign gigawatt-scale AI factory infrastructure in India, with phased capacity references including Chennai cluster expansion.
enrichedSignals.flow: Sovereign AI infrastructure scaling + hyperscale compute partnership -> accelerated regional competitive pressure -> stronger capital allocation urgency for AI-enabled infrastructure platforms
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Verified via first-party L&T press release.

enrichedSignals.title: PIF-linked Diriyah procurement cycle expands across hospitality/smart infrastructure
enrichedSignals.summary: Q1 2026 award activity indicates active procurement windows across construction, mobility, digital systems, and asset-tech scope.
enrichedSignals.flow: Daily buyer-intelligence brief ingestion -> priority channel mapping -> mandate-path preparation
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor pending first-party or Tier-1 source attachments for each item.

enrichedSignals.title: Ethiopia launches AI UniPod to build national AI capacity and regional leadership posture
enrichedSignals.summary: Ethiopia launched an AI University Innovation Pod in Addis Ababa via Ethiopian AI Institute, Addis Ababa University, and UNDP Timbuktoo collaboration, signaling sovereign AI capability formation.
enrichedSignals.flow: National AI institution-building + university partnership + UNDP backing -> stronger regional AI ecosystem capacity -> rising infrastructure and talent-platform investment pressure
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor; multi-source media corroboration attached. Upgrade when first-party Ethiopian institute/government or UNDP release is attached.

enrichedSignals.title: Nigeria accounts for majority share of Africa-to-U.S. crude flows amid U.S. import decline
enrichedSignals.summary: Reported U.S. trade data suggests Nigeria contributed ~52% of Africa-origin crude exports to the U.S. in 2025 while total U.S. African crude imports declined year-on-year.
enrichedSignals.flow: Concentrated export dependency + U.S. sourcing shift -> strategic pressure on Nigeria energy/FX resilience planning -> higher urgency for diversified capital and infrastructure sequencing
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Monitor pending direct first-party U.S. Census data table attachment and/or additional Tier-1 corroboration.

enrichedSignals.title: Dangote outlines post-refinery industrial expansion into steel, power, and ports with NGX listing pathway
enrichedSignals.summary: Narrative indicates refinery scale as phase one, expansion toward steel/power/port infrastructure, major employment ramp, and potential domestic equity participation via NGX listing.
enrichedSignals.flow: Industrial stack integration + domestic market participation pathway -> stronger sovereign-scale manufacturing and logistics thesis -> rising urgency for infrastructure-linked capital sequencing
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Verified via first-party Dangote statement (official site) confirming fuel supply capacity claims.

sources.label: User-provided summary of Dangote expansion narrative

Dangote official statement on domestic supply capacity

enrichedSignals.title: Oil near $85 reshapes African fiscal winners/losers in near-term financing windows
enrichedSignals.summary: Bloomberg-cited framing indicates Nigeria and Angola as relative macro beneficiaries with oil near $85, while South Africa faces relative pressure; implications include widened fiscal room for oil-linked sovereigns but stronger domestic price sensitivity and import-stress divergence.
enrichedSignals.flow: Oil spike vs budget benchmarks -> fiscal/capital-room divergence across sovereigns -> faster mandate timing in beneficiary markets + stress-adjusted sequencing elsewhere
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Tier-1 Bloomberg link provided by user. Treat extreme conflict/shipping sub-claims as separately verification-gated before posture changes.

sources.label: Bloomberg: Nigeria/Angola winners, South Africa loser at oil near $85

enrichedSignals.title: Nigeria and IFC sign cooperation agreement to build PPP project pipeline
enrichedSignals.summary: Nigeria's Federal Ministry of Budget and Economic Planning signed a cooperation agreement with IFC Transaction Advisory Services to develop a pipeline of PPP projects across transport, energy, IT, and sanitation, targeting private-capital mobilization against estimated annual infrastructure needs.
enrichedSignals.flow: Federal-IFC agreement -> transaction-advisory pipeline build -> better-prepared investment-ready PPPs -> increased probability of near-term private capital deployment
enrichedSignals.verification_note: First-party source: IFC official press release dated 3 Feb 2026.

enrichedSignals.title: Amazon signs White House Ratepayer Protection Pledge tied to data-center power-cost commitments
enrichedSignals.summary: Amazon states it signed the White House Ratepayer Protection Pledge and commits to covering full data-center electricity and grid-upgrade costs under long-term utility agreements, framing policy momentum around AI-infrastructure growth with ratepayer safeguards.
enrichedSignals.flow: Federal pledge adoption + hyperscaler cost-coverage commitments -> lower political/regulatory friction for grid interconnection and expansion -> accelerated AI-infrastructure deployment pathways
enrichedSignals.verification_note: First-party source confirms Amazon's announced pledge participation and stated commitments; independent validation of all quantitative impact claims remains pending.

enrichedSignals.title: U.S. DFC announces ~$20B rolling maritime reinsurance backstop for Gulf war-risk trade lanes
enrichedSignals.summary: First-party DFC leadership statement outlines an implementation plan for a rolling maritime reinsurance facility covering losses up to approximately $20B, initially focused on Hull & Machinery and Cargo, coordinated with Treasury and CENTCOM to stabilize maritime trade confidence during Gulf conflict risk.
enrichedSignals.flow: private war-risk withdrawal -> sovereign reinsurance backstop (~$20B rolling) -> reduced actuarial blockade risk -> partial normalization of shipping and energy flow confidence
enrichedSignals.verification_note: First-party on-record executive statement (DFC CEO) with dated implementation details; partner eligibility/pricing/claims mechanics remain execution variables.

enrichedSignals.title: Andhra Pradesh AI gigawatt campus shows pre-FID platform pressure with capital-formation gap
enrichedSignals.summary: Government land/power alignment, L&T EPC execution backbone, and Nvidia anchor with reported 15% equity indicate strong deployment pressure; capital sponsor structure, governance map, risk allocation, and bankability sequencing remain undefined.
enrichedSignals.flow: sovereign enablement + EPC credibility + hyperscaler anchor -> demand pressure rises -> absent commitment architecture delays capital close -> origin window for platform design
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Direct operator-context note indicates capital stack is not yet structured; treat as high-conviction forming signal pending linked public docs for all specifics.

enrichedSignals.title: Dangote refinery begins international export tenders
enrichedSignals.summary: Dangote refinery export tender activity confirms global-market connectivity, but management's domestic-priority stance implies corridor economics are Phase-2 (future export architecture) rather than immediate-scale export trading.
enrichedSignals.flow: domestic-first stabilization -> opportunistic exports + global trading integration -> sustained excess allocation across African supply nodes -> Phase-2 UAE export corridor activation -> global scale distribution
enrichedSignals.verification_note: Public statements support domestic-priority sequencing and global crude/trade linkage. Track activation triggers before treating as immediate export-volume platform.

enrichedSignals.title: IFC FY26 budget confirms mobilization-first posture with IDA/FCS and infrastructure emphasis
enrichedSignals.summary: IFC FY26 budget and resource plan confirms prioritization of private capital mobilization (PCM), upstream/advisory services, IDA/FCS focus, and sectors including energy/water, digital connectivity, climate resilience, and MSME value chains.
enrichedSignals.flow: Budget priorities -> instrument emphasis (MCPP, credit insurance, securitization, advisory, equity vehicles) -> stronger platform financing pathways in target sectors/geographies
enrichedSignals.verification_note: First-party IFC FY26 Budget paper approved by Board (May 28, 2025).
